title: Archived Items.. Central location?
excerpt: We would love to see a feature added on monday where we can view all archived items in ONE PLACE! Rather than viewing them a board at a time!! It would be a game changer!

posts.author: taybrown13 (taylor brown)
posts.cookedHtml: We would love to see a feature added on monday where we can view all archived items in ONE PLACE! Rather than viewing them a board at a time!! It would be a game changer!

posts.author: argyll (argyll)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree :D. for now for a temporary fix try to create a new workspace named " Archived " so when you don’t need an item you just move it their =) just remember to have the same columns at that workspace so that all moved items will have no missing columns

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Taylor, you can do this with our app called Master Data! Once you set it up and sync items to a master board, if you archive the original item, the Item’s status on the Master Board will change to Archived. After that you simply add a view, and save the Archived Status as a filter.
Link is here → Master Data - monday.com App Marketplace

Let me know if you would like a demo, or if you need help with set up :).
